title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at PGIMER Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at PGIMER Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? PGIMER Advisory Limited in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PGIMER Advisory Limited:
PGIMER Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER Advisory Limited!
